metadata.title: Clawzy — Your AI Lobster
metadata.description: Ready-to-use AI assistant, no setup needed, start chatting instantly

landing.heroDesc: No API keys, no coding, no servers. Sign up and get a 24/7 AI lobster to chat, write, and get things done.
landing.ctaSubtext: 500 free energy on signup, no card required
landing.feature1Desc: Sign up → lobster goes online → start chatting. No configuration needed.
landing.feature2Desc: From lightning fast to super smart, switch on demand. Save energy or go premium — your call.
landing.feature3Desc: Each lobster has its own memory and workspace. Your data belongs to you.

auth.lobsterWaiting: Your lobster is waiting for you
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.sendFailed: Failed to send, please try again
auth.emailSentDesc: If this email is registered, you'll receive a password reset email. Check your inbox (including spam).
auth.invalidLinkDesc: This reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetFailed: Reset failed, link may have expired
auth.verifyFailed: Verification failed, link may have expired

models.title: Available Brains
models.description: Browse all brain models your lobster can use

legal.termsAcceptanceDesc: By accessing or using Clawzy.ai (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
legal.termsServiceDesc: Clawzy.ai provides AI assistant agents powered by open-source software. Each user receives isolated AI agent instances running in dedicated containers. The Service offers various subscription tiers with different energy (credit) allocations.
legal.termsCreditsDesc: Energy credits are consumed when interacting with AI models. Credit costs vary by model. Unused monthly credits do not roll over. Refunds are handled per Stripe's policies. We reserve the right to adjust pricing with 30 days' notice.
legal.termsConductDesc: You agree not to use the Service for any unlawful purpose, to generate harmful or illegal content, to attempt to bypass usage limits, or to interfere with other users' access to the Service.
legal.termsOpenSourceDesc: Clawzy.ai is built on open-source software including OpenClaw (MIT License, Copyright 2025 Peter Steinberger) and LiteLLM (MIT License). Full license texts are available in our THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES file. The use of open-source components does not affect your rights or obligations under these Terms.
legal.termsDisclaimerDesc: The Service is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. AI-generated responses may contain errors. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid in the 12 months preceding any claim.
legal.privacyCollectDesc: We collect information you provide during registration (email, name), usage data (energy consumption, interaction counts), and payment information (processed via Stripe — we do not store credit card numbers).
legal.privacyUseDesc: Your information is used solely to: provide and improve the Service, process payments, and send essential service notifications. We do not sell your personal information.
legal.privacyIsolationDesc: Each user's AI agent runs in an isolated Docker container with its own memory and workspace. Your conversation data is completely isolated from other users.
legal.privacyOpenSourceDesc: This Service uses the open-source AI agent framework OpenClaw (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw, MIT License) to run your AI assistant. OpenClaw runs within your isolated container and does not send your data to the OpenClaw project.
legal.privacyThirdPartyDesc: We use the following third-party services: Stripe (payment processing), AI model providers (DeepSeek, Qwen, etc. for processing your conversation requests), and Cloudflare (CDN and security). Each third-party service is governed by its own privacy policy.
legal.privacyRightsDesc: You have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, delete your account and data, and export your data. To exercise these rights, contact us using the information below.
legal.privacyContactDesc: For any privacy-related questions, contact us at: privacy@clawzy.ai

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
